parameters.content: When a user clicks a button in Slack, Slack sends a webhook payload to n8n workflow and expects a response within 3 seconds. Otherwise, it'll show an operation time-out error

json.ai_generated_response:
Understood. Many restaurants we partner with operate the same way, focusing on a high volume of smaller orders.

The key advantage we offer for these setups is *capturing customer data* with every transaction. This allows you to use our automation to turn those one-off orders into repeat customers through targeted marketing.

Are you currently able to capture any data from these orders today, or are they mostly anonymous?

parameters.content: When a user clicks a button in Slack, Slack sends a webhook payload to n8n workflow and expects a response within 3 seconds. Otherwise, it'll show an operation time-out error
